core_mechanism: a threshold-triggered excitable dynamical system in which a continuously integrated state variable evolves by differential-equation dynamics until it crosses a critical threshold, emitting a discrete pulse event and resetting — hybrid continuous-evolution-plus-discrete-reset pulse (spike) generation
brief_reason: The abstract centers on modeling membrane-potential dynamics that produce spikes, i.e. the shared integrate-toward-a-threshold, fire-a-discrete-pulse, and reset machinery underlying the surveyed single-entity spiking neuron models.
